metadata.name: Use VAR to Review a Disputed Goal

description: A goal is scored in a soccer match, but the referee suspects an offside violation. The Video Assistant Referee (VAR) must review the play.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all camera angles of the play leading up to the goal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accesses and syncs feeds from all broadcast cameras.

nodes.task_description: Use virtual line technology to determine the player's position at the exact moment the ball was passed.

expected_outcome.expected: The technology shows the attacking player was in an offside position.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the finding to the on-field referee, recommending they disallow the goal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a clear and concise recommendation to the referee.
